policy_name: Mock PDS Eligibility Policy for ZKP Prototype
policy_description: This policy file defines the eligibility conditions for issuing a beneficiary credential.
It is a simplified prototype policy and does not represent the full real-world PDS policy framework.
The main purpose is to support mock credential generation and zero-knowledge proof input preparation.

PHH.notes: Used as a simplified prototype entitlement.

AAY.notes: Used as a simplified prototype entitlement for vulnerable households.

revocation_policy.description: Credential must not be revoked at the time of proof verification.

notes: The descriptive fields are included for readability and documentation.
The credential generator may use only the threshold and entitlement fields programmatically.
